'''Ellisa Shallence''' was the [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baroness Administrator]] of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] some time before [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] took over the facility.

When arrested by the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Security Guard]], [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] requested that she preside over his case. After having been found guilty, Ellisa sentenced him to fifteen years of involuntary service to the [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] community and to undergo cyborg augmentation.

{{Char-stub}}
